description: Verification value: on a no-edge random walk, naive 'pick the best Sharpe' crowns luck. The Deflated Sharpe (discounted for N agents tried) and the PBO flag the overfit before capital is committed.
market: synthetic random walk (drift 0, vol 1.5%, 600 bars), seed 42
finding: On a no-edge random walk the verification layer refuses to crown noise: the cross-agent PBO is 0.7659 (naively crowning the in-sample best agent would be overfit ~77% of the time), and the apparent winner ('rl-qlearn') has a Deflated Sharpe of 0.268 after discounting for 6 agents tried — both flag 'luck, not skill' before any capital is risked. (The best raw Sharpe was only 0.005044: the agents do not manufacture edge from noise, and the statistics confirm it.)
